name: Bouillabaisse Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Skewer shrimp and scallops on 8-inch bamboo skewers, using 1 shrimp and 1 scallop per skewer. Wrap the tail of each shrimp around its corresponding scallop.
2. In a saucepan, mix together tomato sauce, minced clams (6-1/2 oz), Pernod, minced garlic (20 milliliters), bay leaf, basil, salt, pepper, and saffron.
3. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
4. Arrange the skewered fish in a shallow baking dish.
5. Drizzle the sauce over the skewers.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes. Makes 24 servings.
